raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad zehlohs es/ un gah-
ju Eeleijā/ un redsi/ tur stahwe-
ja ta KURGA Gohdiba/ itt ka
 ta Gohdiba/ ko es biju redsejs
pee tahs Uppes Kebar. Un es
krittu us sawu Watgu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nahze tas Gars eeksch
mannis/ un uzbekle manni us
mannahm Kahjahm/ un wiꞥſch
runnaja us man/ un fazztia us
man: Eij/ aptlehdsesß tawa
Nammā.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo tu Jilweka Behrns/
raugi/ teiw taps refnas Wirroes
peeliftas/ un tee faistths tew ar
tahm/ ka tu no winnu Widdus
ne warr isinukt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es likschu tawu Meh-
li pee tawa Schohda peelipt/ ka
tew buhs mehman paliet/ un
teem wairs par Pahrmahzitaju
ne buht/ jo tee irr weens pahr-
galwigs Nams.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet kad es ar tew run-
nafchu/ tad atdarrischu es tawu
Mutti/ un tew buhs us teem
fazztht: Ta fakka tas Kungs
KUNGS: Kas klausa tas lai
klauſa/ un kas ne klauka tas lai
ne klauſa/ jo tee irr weens pahr-
galwigs Nams.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "N tu Jilweka Behrns/
Jiemnees weenu Stee-
geli/ un leez to tawa
Preekfcha/ un raksti us to to
Pilsfahtu Jerusalemi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un taizi prett winnu Ap-
lehgereschann/ un ustaisi prett
winnu Bulwerkus/ un usmett
prett winnu weenu Walli/ un
ezell Karra-Spehku prett win-
nu/ un leez Abschus prett winnu
apkahrt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wehl jiemnees weenu Dsel-
ses Pannu/ un leez to par wee-
nu Dselses Muhri starp tew un
starp to Pilsfahtu/ un grees ta-
wu Watgu prett winnu/ ka ta
tohp aplehgereta/ un tew buhs
prett winnu apnestees. Tas
buhs tam Israēta Namnam
par Sihmi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ir tu apgulles us tawu
kreisu Sahnu/ un leez us to ta
Israēta Naimma Noseegunnu
velz to Deenu Pulka/ kainchr
tu us to gullesi/ buhs tew winnu
Noseegunmus nest.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo es darrischu to Pulku
winng Noseegshanas Gaddu
tew par Deenam/ trihssints
un dewindeſinitś Deenas/ katew
buhs nest to Noseegunnu ta I-
sraēta Namna-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kad tu schihs pabeigţi/
tad apgulles ohtrā Reisē us
tawu labbu Sahnu/ un tew
buhs to Noseegunnu ta Namna
Juha nest tſchetredeſinitś Dee-
nas/es efinn tew Deenas preelfch
Gaddeem dewis.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
